heading: Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund
label: 9505 Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsecs. Amendments2020—Subsec. (a)(2). substituted “Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation” for “Saint Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation”.Pub. L. 116–2602014—Subsec. (c)(1). struck out “(as in effect on the date of the enactment of the Water Resources Development Act of 1996)” after “1986”.Pub. L. 113–1211996—Subsec. (c)(1). amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) read as follows: “to carry out section 210(a) of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 (as in effect on the date of enactment of this section),”.Pub. L. 104–3031993—Subsec. (c)(3). amended par. (3) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (3) read as follows: “for the payment of all expenses of administration incurred—Pub. L. 103–182“(A) by the Department of the Treasury in administering subchapter A of chapter 36 (relating to harbor maintenance tax), but not in excess of $5,000,000 for any fiscal year, and“(B) for periods during which no fee applies under paragraph (9) or (10) of section 13031(a) of the Consolidated Omnibus Budget Reconciliation Act of 1985.”

Effective Date of 1993 Amendment, , , which provided that the amendment made by was applicable to fiscal years beginning after , was repealed by , , , effective on the date the USMCA entered into force ().Pub. children.text: appropriated to the Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund as provided in this section,
transferred to the Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund by the Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation pursuant to , orsection 13(a) of the Act of May 13, 1954
credited to the Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund as provided in section 9602(b).

children.heading: Transfer to Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund of amounts equivalent to certain taxes
children.label: b Transfer to Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund of amounts equivalent to certain taxes
children.text: There are hereby appropriated to the Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund amounts equivalent to the taxes received in the Treasury under section 4461 (relating to harbor maintenance tax).

children.heading: Expenditures from Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund
children.label: c Expenditures from Harbor Maintenance Trust Fund

children.text: to carry out section 210 of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986,
for payments of rebates of tolls or charges pursuant to (as in effect on ), andsection 13(b) of the Act of May 13, 1954April 1, 1987

for the payment of all expenses of administration incurred by the Department of the Treasury, the Army Corps of Engineers, and the Department of Commerce related to the administration of subchapter A of chapter 36 (relating to harbor maintenance tax), but not in excess of $5,000,000 for any fiscal year.
